name: Data Dictionary Generator
description: Generate comprehensive data dictionaries from datasets

agents.name: Data Profiler
agents.purpose: Profile the dataset and extract metadata
agents.system_prompt_hint: Profile the dataset: for each column identify name, data type, description, sample values, null percentage, unique count, min/max values, distribution pattern, and potential PII flags.

agents.name: Dictionary Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a data dictionary with: table/file overview, column-by-column documentation in a table format, data quality summary, relationships to other tables (if known), business rules and constraints, common queries, and data lineage notes.

suggestion_card.title: Data Dictionary
suggestion_card.subtitle: Generate data dictionaries
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Create a data dictionary for: [dataset description]

author: agentfactory
